news.summary: Balfour Beatty Communities, a leading residential real estate firm, has finished building new homes for U.S. Army senior leaders at Fort Hamilton in Brooklyn, NY. These homes are within the Fort Hamilton Family Homes, a privatized military housing community. Situated in the Officers Row neighborhood, the new homes provide modern living spaces for senior Army officials. This project showcases Balfour Beatty's commitment to providing quality housing for military personnel.
news.headline: Balfour Beatty & U.S. Army Fort Hamilton finish new homes for senior leaders at Fort Hamilton, Brooklyn.
US recession not expected this year, says Hassett.

news.summary: New York - USA TODAY, which is a part of Gannett Co., Inc. (NYSE: GCI), has introduced USA TODAY Studio IX, a new centralized content platform. This platform is dedicated to showcasing the achievements and influence of female athletes through a range of news, events, multimedia content, and more in various women's sports and leagues. USA TODAY Studio IX offers in-depth coverage of women's sports, including the WNBA, college sports, soccer, high school sports, WTA, LPGA, Olympic sports, and more, from across the USA TODAY Network.
news.headline: USA TODAY launches Studio IX, multimedia hub for female sports, covers WNBA, college sports, soccer, more.

news.summary: The ZIP ultra-portable projector, which received high praise at CES and MWC 2025, is now officially launched in the United States and Canada. This innovative projector has garnered excitement and acclaim for its design.
news.headline: Aurzen ZIP Projector, a crowd favorite from CES and MWC 2025, now available in US and Canada.

news.summary: A cutting-edge power infrastructure asset with a capacity of 620 MW has been established in New England, indicating significant progress in meeting the rising demand for artificial intelligence and power supply. On April 14, 2025, ArcLight Capital Partners, LLC shared this development, revealing that its managed fund has initiated operations in the region. The fund, overseen by ArcLight and its affiliates, signifies a strategic move to address the increasing need for energy-intensive technologies like AI. This initiative underscores the importance of investing in modern power solutions to support evolving demands in technology and electricity consumption.
news.headline: ArcLight Capital Partners, LLC buys Kleen Power Interests, a 620 MW power asset in New England, aiding AI and power demand.

news.summary: GCI Communication Corp has teamed up with Ericsson for the construction and operation of their core network. The partnership involves the deployment of the 5G Core as a component of Ericsson's dual-mode 5G Core solution to facilitate GCI's continuous evolution. Ericsson will now manage core network operations throughout all network services.
news.headline: GCI Communication Corp collaborates with Ericsson to implement new 5G Core network, Ericsson to manage core network operations.

news.summary: In St. Helena, California, the Duckhorn Portfolio, known as North America's leading luxury wine company, revealed the appointment of Nihar Bhatt as the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer starting April 14, 2025. Additionally, Jeff Ngo was named the Executive Vice President and Chief Growth Officer, with his role commencing on April 30, 2025. Nihar Bhatt boasts over two decades of expertise in financial management, operations, mergers and acquisitions, as well as strategy, enhancing The Duckhorn Portfolio's leadership team.
news.headline: Duckhorn Portfolio appoints Nihar Bhatt CFO and Jeff Ngo Chief Growth Officer. Bhatt starts on April 14, 2025, and Ngo on April 30, 2025.

news.summary: Seoul, South Korea - Korea Zinc Co., Ltd. (KRX: 010130) has stated that MBK Partners might encounter difficulties in raising funds amidst controversies related to discount supermarket chain Homeplus. Public funds and investors are closely monitoring the obstacles facing the private equity fund. Public funds are showing caution due to compliance risks associated with MBK Partners. This caution arises from the concerns surrounding the ongoing issues involving Homeplus and the private equity fund.
news.headline: Korea Zinc warns MBK Partners of fundraising hurdles amid regulatory probes involving discount chain Homeplus, with public funds cautious.

news.summary: Great Lakes Auto, based in Austin, Texas, has decided to extend its partnership with CDK for their dealerships in Ohio and New York. This collaboration will see the company making use of CDK's Dealership Xperience and CDK Network Solutions to enhance their operations.
news.headline: Great Lakes Auto Group extends partnership with CDK for Ohio and New York dealerships. Using CDK Dealership Xperience and Network Solutions.

news.summary: SAN CARLOS, Calif.--Presto Phoenix, Inc., a prominent provider of drive-thru Voice AI for the quick-service restaurant (QSR) sector in the U.S., has unveiled its phone ordering business unit during the Restaurant Leadership Conference (RLC) in Phoenix. CEO Gee Lefevre expressed his enthusiasm for this new development, highlighting that the inclusion of AI-native phone ordering will expand their Voice AI solutions portfolio for customers. This strategic move aims to enhance service offerings and cater to a wider range of client needs.
news.headline: Presto expands with phone ordering for QSRs, provides enterprise-grade Voice AI solutions. CEO excited for broader offerings.

news.summary: Located in Miami Beach, Florida, Carillon Miami Wellness Resort has introduced Inner Glow: A Menopause & Perimenopause Retreat, designed to cater to women's health needs. The program, set in one of the largest spas and wellness centers along the Eastern Seaboard, aims to provide support, renewal, and empowerment for women navigating menopause and perimenopause. The retreat is medically guided and offers a transformative experience for women seeking relief during this significant phase of life. The initiative comes at a time when there is an increasing interest in wellness retreats focused on women's health.
news.headline: Carillon Miami Wellness Resort launches Inner Glow: Menopause & Perimenopause Retreat for women's health.

news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, UNIFI, Inc. (NYSE: UFI) has introduced a new product line, REPREVE with CiCLO® technology. This innovation involves recycled polyester and nylon that incorporates a biodegradable technology, enabling synthetic materials to decompose naturally. The initiative was developed in partnership with Intrinsic Advanced Materials, LLC, a collaboration between Parkdale Advanced Materials, Inc. and Intrinsic Text. REPREVE with CiCLO technology marks a significant advancement in sustainability within the industry and demonstrates UNIFI's commitment to environmental responsibility.
news.headline: UNIFI launches REPREVE with CiCLO technology, biodegradable recycled polyester and nylon. Collaboration with IAM. (295 chars)

news.summary: In anticipation of Easter, Americans are gearing up for a chocolate-filled celebration. A staggering 73 million pounds of chocolate are projected to be devoured this holiday, translating to a whopping $2 billion in sales. To put it into perspective, this amount of chocolate could produce over 1 billion 1-ounce chocolate eggs and about 400 million 3-ounce chocolate bunnies. In fact, if these bunnies were lined up end-to-end, they would stretch from New York City to Los Angeles.
news.headline: Americans will consume 73 million pounds of chocolate this Easter, equating to over $2 billion in sales.

news.summary: The Allied Market Research report on the global krill meal market, titled "Krill Meal Market - Global Opportunity Analysis and Industry Forecast, 2024-2035," reveals the market was valued at US$208.4 million in 2023 and is projected to have a CAGR of 6.0% from 2024 to 2035, reaching US$416.5 million by 2035. The growth is attributed to the increasing demand for clean-label food products and natural flavor enhancers. The market is primarily driven by demand from the pet food, animal feed, and aquaculture sectors. Antarctic krill, known for its high protein content, omega-3 fatty acids, and astaxanthin, serves as the primary source for krill meal. Companies like Aker BioMarine and Rimfrost AS are investing in environmentally friendly harvesting methods. The Asia-Pacific region dominates the market, fueled by the aquaculture sectors in China, India, and Indonesia. North America and Europe see increasing demand for high-end pet food and livestock nutrition. The report segments the market based on source, application, form, and region. The Antarctic krill source, aquafeed application, and powder form segments are highlighted as dominant. Sustainable initiatives and technological advancements are expected to drive long-term market growth.
news.headline: Krill Meal Market to reach $259.7M by 2027 and $416.5M by 2035 globally, growing at 6.0% CAGR, driven by demand for clean-label food.

news.summary: Costa Mesa based company, ChargeTronix, has unveiled a range of cutting-edge electric vehicle (EV) charging products. The new lineup includes the 1,280 KW Nexus Distributed Charging System tailored for fleets, and the latest 240 KW chargers for both fleets and individual vehicles. These offerings have been developed to meet the escalating demand for charging solutions as EV usage surges in the United States. The 1,280 KW Nexus Distributed Charging System is a notable addition to the company's portfolio.
news.headline: ChargeTronix releases new 1,280 KW Nexus Charging System and 240 KW EV Chargers to meet growing EV adoption in the US.

news.summary: Peachtree Group has recently unveiled the opening of the new TownePlace Suites in Forney, Texas. The hotel boasts 87 suites and is set to welcome guests with a range of modern amenities and services.
news.headline: Peachtree Group opens 87-suite TownePlace Suites in Forney, Texas.
NVIDIA: NVIDIA to manufacture American-made AI supercomputers in US for first time.

news.summary: Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc., a prominent company in engineered structural connectors and building solutions, disclosed that it will release its financial results for the first quarter concluding on March 31 of the current year. This announcement was made from Pleasanton, California on April 14, 2025. The Company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as SSD, is recognized for its innovations in the industry.
news.headline: Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc. will announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 28. Company trades as SSD on NYSE.

news.summary: With the decrease in inflation rate, the targeted retirement savings goal has dropped by $200,000, reverting back to the levels observed in 2022 and 2023. Over 50% of Americans believe there is a possibility that they might outlast their savings. Additionally, 60% of individuals from Generation Z and Millennials have expressed concerns about placing excessive emphasis on investing rather than other financial priorities.
news.headline: Americans believe they need $1.26 million to retire comfortably; expectations decrease by $200K. Over 50% fear outliving savings. Gen Z and Millennials express concerns about investing too much.

news.summary: A state-of-the-art facility by the renowned 2025 AIA Architecture Firm Award winner is set to transform healthcare for the Redding Rancheria tribe. Located in Irvine, California, this innovative project will merge cutting-edge medical techniques with holistic health and wellness resources. The new facility promises to revolutionize healthcare delivery for the tribe, offering a unique approach to promote overall well-being.
news.headline: Construction starts on new Redding Rancheria health facility designed by award-winning firm to transform healthcare for the tribe with medical and holistic resources.

news.summary: Wistia, a prominent video marketing platform for businesses based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has introduced advanced video localization features on April 14, 2025. These new features include artificial intelligence (AI) technology for video translation and dubbing, aimed at helping brands connect with global audiences in their native languages. This innovation is set to enhance the reach of businesses by making their video content more accessible and engaging worldwide.
news.headline: Wistia introduces AI translation & dubbing for global reach-1st in the industry. Helps brands connect with global audiences via native languages.

news.summary: The new series, based on the top free-to-play bingo app globally, promises huge prizes and continuous excitement. From HERZLIYA, Israel, it has been revealed that Bingo Blitz, the premier free-to-play bingo game available on mobile devices and computers*, is set to transition to television screens, marking a significant development in...
news.headline: Bingo Blitz, top free bingo app, transitions to TV with new game show on Game Show Network for big wins and action.

news.summary: Attorney General Kwame Raoul disclosed today that $24 million from the 2023 Juul Labs settlement will be utilized to back the initiatives of the nation's largest nonprofit focused on youth vaping prevention. The funds will assist in the launch of the "EX Program" campaign statewide in Chicago.
news.headline: AG Raoul allocates $24M from Juul settlement for IL youth vaping prevention, EX Program campaign statewide.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Los Angeles, Pash, a pioneering skincare company emphasizing effective clinically supported skin defense and rejuvenation, excitedly unveils its official brand debut featuring the first product, Pash Rescue and Repair Lotion. This scientifically formulated...
news.headline: Harry Jowsey launches Pash skincare brand in LA, unveiling Pash Rescue and Repair Lotion for skin protection.

news.summary: TransPerfect, a leading provider of language and AI solutions for global business, has recently acquired two studios, MPC and The Mill, formerly part of the Technicolor Group in France. This acquisition strengthens TransPerfect's position as the world's largest provider in this sector. The company welcomed a significant number of staff from these divisions to its team. The move signifies a strategic development in TransPerfect's expansion plans and cements its presence in the industry.
news.headline: TransPerfect acquires France-based Technicolor Group studios MPC and The Mill, welcoming staff from former divisions.

news.summary: In White Plains, N.Y. on April 10, 2025, a recent study revealed a groundbreaking method to curb adolescent substance abuse, leading to significant decreases in tobacco and alcohol misuse among high schoolers. The findings were published in Psychology of Addictive Behavior, a respected scientific journal.
news.headline: Hybrid eLearning program cuts tobacco and alcohol use in half among high school students, study shows.

news.summary: Synchrony, a leading consumer financial services firm, has announced the extension of its strategic partnership with Ashley in an effort to bolster retail growth and provide more flexible financing choices for customers. This collaboration, revealed on April 14, 2025, will see Synchrony working closely with Ashley, the biggest retailer in Arcadia, Wisconsin, to enhance the overall consumer experience. Synchrony, listed on NYSE as SYF, is recognized for its innovative financial solutions and together with Ashley, they aim to drive sales and offer attractive financing options. This partnership marks a significant step in enhancing customer satisfaction and driving growth in the retail sector.
news.headline: Synchrony and Ashley extend partnership to offer flexible financing options, celebrating 15 years.

news.summary: In London on April 14, 2025, Poolhouse, a cutting-edge pool entertainment venture by the creators of Topgolf, has successfully secured $34 million in its initial funding round. This investment was spearheaded by Sharp Alpha, a prominent US venture capital firm, alongside dmg ventures, the consumer-focused venture capital fund of DMGT.
news.headline: Poolhouse, created by Topgolf founders, raises $34m in funding to innovate pool entertainment. Led by Sharp Alpha and dmg ventures.

news.summary: In London on April 14, 2025, Fospha, a comprehensive marketing measurement platform, released a new study revealing strategies to optimize Google Performance Max (PMAX) and Paid Search performance in 2025. The research highlights how brands are ramping up investments in Google's Demand Capture.
news.headline: Fospha report shows 61% growth potential in Google Performance Max and Paid Search. Major insights for brands.

news.summary: In 2024, Robbie K. Melton, a renowned higher education figure, was honored with the HBCU Lifetime Achievement Faculty Network Award. This esteemed individual, known for their work as a national researcher, speaker, author, and international consultant, is set to delve into the profound impact of Artificial Intelligence. This presentation is scheduled to take place in Washington on April 14, 2025.
news.headline: Robbie Melton, 2024 HBCU Faculty Network Award recipient, to speak on AI at 2025 MS-CC Annual Meeting in Washington.

news.summary: In Chapel Hill, North Carolina on April 14, 2025 - CData Software revealed that major players in the industry such as Google Cloud, Salesforce, and TIBCO have integrated CData connectors into their products to enhance connectivity. This move showcases a strong momentum for CData Software, a top provider of data connectivity solutions.
news.headline: CData Software announces launch of CData Embedded Cloud Service, used by industry leaders like Google Cloud.

news.summary: Introducing the Zenni EcoBloomz frames, an eco-friendly eyewear collection set to launch on April 14 during Earth Month. Made from recycled and renewable materials, Zenni Optical, a top online eyewear retailer, is spearheading the release. The frames are designed with environmental consciousness in mind and will be available for purchase starting April 14, 2025.
news.headline: Zenni Optical introduces EcoBloomz frames made from recycled materials, available April 14, 2025. #sustainable #eyewear

news.summary: Cotton Incorporated and CAKE PICNIC recently hosted a successful event at The Carlsbad Flower Fields in San Diego on April 14, 2025. The celebration, which was sold out, took place amidst the colorful ranunculus blooms. The collaboration between Cotton Incorporated and CAKE PICNIC showcased a variety of cakes to the delight of attendees, with a focus on embracing the arrival of spring.
news.headline: Sold-out spring celebration at Carlsbad Flower Fields with 160+ cakes and ranunculus blooms by Cotton Incorporated and CAKE PICNIC.

news.summary: Freddie Mac announced today that it has successfully auctioned off 28 deeply delinquent non-performing residential first lien loans (NPLs) from its investment portfolio to VRMTG ACQ, LLC. The total balance of the loans amounts to around $5.3 million and they are currently being managed by NewRez LLC, d/b/a Shellpoint Mortgage Servicing. This sale is part of Freddie Mac's Extended Timeline Pool Offering (EXPO®) and the deal is set to be finalized in June 2025. The marketing of the transaction to potential bidders in the NPL market began on March 6, 2025, led by Freddie Mac's advisors.
news.headline: Freddie Mac sells $5.3 million in non-performing loans through auction to VRMTG ACQ, LLC, with 28 loans involved.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Sprout Social (Nasdaq: SPT), a leading provider of cloud-based social media management software, announced the launch of its updated influencer marketing platform. The new Sprout Social Influencer Marketing platform introduces a redesigned interface and incorporates advanced AI technology for natural language discovery and data analysis. These updates cater to the changing landscape of content consumption, emphasizing personalized feeds and specific interests. The platform now offers a topic-focused search function to align with how social networks distribute content. This enhancement allows brands to swiftly identify suitable creators for genuine collaborations, expand their reach, and boost revenue.
news.headline: Sprout Social enhances influencer marketing platform with AI tech for personalized feeds, faster creator matches.

news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) organized its annual Fiber Day on the Hill event on April 9 at the Rayburn Foyer, attracting nearly 300 Congressional staffers. The event highlighted the significance of fiber broadband in driving community development, economic growth, and supporting advancements in technologies like AI. With participation from 42 industry leaders and Capitol Hill representatives, the event aimed to emphasize the transformative impact of fiber broadband.
news.headline: Nearly 300 Hill staffers attend "Fiber Day on the Hill" event showcasing the impact of fiber broadband on economy and tech future.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.4% in 2022, following a 5.9% expansion in 2021. The United States is expected to see a growth rate of 4.0% this year, while China's economy is forecasted to expand by 5.1%. In comparison, the Eurozone is estimated to grow by 3.2%, with Japan's economy set to increase by 2.4%. These projections indicate a somewhat slower but still positive growth trajectory for the world's major economies in the coming year.
news.headline: Tether becomes leading crypto lender post-sector crash, lending $B millions - report.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Regional Health Properties, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the third quarter ending on December 31, 2024. The company, specializing in healthcare real estate focused on senior living and long-term care, operates under tickers OTCQB: RHEP, OTCQB: RHEPB, and OTCQB: RHEPA. They are described as self-managed and shared the latest figures from the quarter.
news.headline: Regional Health Properties (RHEP) reports Q4 & Full Year 2024 financial results, specializing in senior living & long-term care.

news.summary: Denny’s Corporation, the parent company of Denny's Inc. and Keke's Inc., will release its financial and operating results for the first quarter ending March 26, 2025, on May 5, 2025, after market hours. A conference call led by senior management is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to review the results and address inquiries. The company, listed on NASDAQ as DENN, is based in Spartanburg, South Carolina.
news.headline: Denny's Corp to reveal Q1 2025 results on May 5, 2025, after markets close. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET on same day.

news.summary: Legible, a leading tech company, has recently been awarded the prestigious Global Tech Award for their innovative contributions to the industry. The company has also announced the release of a modern edition of Kahlil Gibran's The Prophet, transformed into an AI Classic for the 21st century. This updated version combines traditional literature with cutting-edge technology. Additionally, Legible has issued a corporate update detailing their latest advancements and progress in the field. This recognition and release mark important milestones for Legible as they continue to push boundaries and redefine the intersection of technology and literature.
news.headline: Legible launches Kahlil Gibran's The Prophet as AI Classic and wins Global Tech Award in corporate update.

news.summary: Increase in gross margin percentage led to a decrease in net loss, contributing to improved cash flow from operations. This positive change resulted in better financial performance and stability for the company. The specific figures for the gross margin percentage increase, net loss reduction, and cash flow improvement were not provided in the news.
news.headline: Freight Technologies reports higher gross margin, reduced net loss, and improved cash flow for 2024, optimistic outlook for 2025.

news.summary: Collaborates with Berkot’s in a strategic partnership to utilize their patented self-watering display technology. This partnership aims to enhance product freshness and minimize shrinkage in stores. The advanced technology is set to revolutionize the retail industry by providing efficient and sustainable solutions.
news.headline: Edible Garden partners with Berkot's in retail agreement, using self-watering display to boost freshness and reduce shrink.

news.summary: An experienced solar industry leader has been appointed to spearhead ARRAY's global product strategy and establish a technical sales team. This move aims to drive innovation and improve customer interaction.
news.headline: ARRAY Technologies has appointed Nick Strevel as Senior VP of Product Mgmt & Tech Sales to lead its global product strategy & develop technical sales function, boosting innovation & customer engagement.

news.summary: Agoura Hills, CA - On April 14, 2025, MultiCorp International, Inc. (OTC Markets PINK: MCIC) reported the signing of a Quadripartite Agreement on March 26, 2025. The agreement involves a significant $2,000,000,000 credit transfer from a leading European Bank to Neoforma Inc.'s local institution, aiming to provide prompt access to liquidity for the latter.
news.headline: MultiCorp International, Inc. secured a $2 billion credit transfer from a European bank for liquidity.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was indicated that the unemployment rate in the country decreased to 4.2% last month, marking a 0.4% decline from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs in various sectors, surpassing economists' expectations. Moreover, the labor force participation rate rose to 62.5%, showing an increase in individuals looking for work. The strong job market conditions have also led to a 3.5% growth in average hourly wages, providing a boost to workers' income. Overall, these statistics suggest a positive trend in the nation's job market and economic landscape.
news.headline: NeuroOne® OneRF® technology showcased on Fox News for its success.

news.summary: In Hong Kong on April 14, 2025, Borqs Technologies, Inc. (U.S. OTC: BRQSF) finalized the sale of its primary operations to Sasken Technologies, Ltd. (India NSE: SASKEN, BSE: 532663). Sasken, a prominent global firm specializing in product engineering and digital transformation services, acquired Borqs' embedded software design and customized hardware manufacturing for Internet of Things (IoT) endeavors. The transaction amounted to US$40 million, with a portion allocated for employees, tax deductions, and contingent payments dependent on 2025 performance outcomes.
news.headline: Borqs Technologies sells core business to Sasken Technologies for $40 million with earnout arrangement tied to 2025 performance.

news.summary: Costume rights for the popular franchise PAW Patrol® and the upcoming film PAW Patrol™: The Dino Movie have been acquired by Disguise for North America. This deal encompasses the production of costumes related to the franchise and the movie across the region. PAW Patrol® is a well-known brand among children, and the upcoming film is highly anticipated. Disguise will have the opportunity to create costumes based on these properties, catering to the fanbase. This agreement is expected to lead to an increase in the availability of PAW Patrol® and PAW Patrol™: The Dino Movie costumes in the North American market, providing fans with more options to engage with their favorite characters.
news.headline: Disguise has acquired costume rights for PAW Patrol franchise & the upcoming film PAW Patrol: The Dino Movie in North America.

news.summary: The recently opened banking center can be found in the CityPlace Tower, situated in the bustling center of West Palm Beach. This strategic location ensures easy access for customers and residents in the area. The center is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and technology to provide top-notch services to its clients. With a total of 10 floors, the CityPlace Tower stands tall in the heart of the city, offering panoramic views of the surrounding area. The banking center aims to cater to the financial needs of the community, with a staff of over 50 dedicated professionals ready to assist clients. Visit the new banking center today to experience unparalleled service in a convenient and central location.
news.headline: Amerant Bank opens new Palm Beach County Regional Office and West Palm Beach Banking Center at CityPlace Tower.
New ASUS ExpertBook P1, P3, and P5 laptops now in Canada, offering professionals top-notch performance.

news.summary: In Paris, New York, and Singapore, AMTD Group Inc. (referred to as "AMTD") and The Generation Essentials Group, a subsidiary of AMTD Digital, have revealed the success of AMTD's newest offering, an extended version of "The Last Dance." The film has been met with continued popularity since its premiere on Ching Ming Festival, achieving significant milestones in the cinematic world. The box office numbers speak volumes, with the movie grossing over one million dollars during its opening weekend. This success has been consistent, with ongoing positive reception.
news.headline: AMTD's "The Last Dance" is 1st HK film to rank top 3 highest-grossing, earning over $1M in opening weekend.
